nasb.text: Then he returned and walked in the house once back and forth, and went up and stretched himself on him; and the lad sneezed seven times and the lad opened his eyes.

esv.text: Then he got up again and walked once back and forth in the house, and went up and stretched himself upon him. The child sneezed seven times, and the child opened his eyes.

cnv.text: 然後他下來在房內來回走了一趟，再上去，伏在孩子身上；那孩子打了七個噴嚏，跟著就張開了眼睛。

ccb.text: 然后，以利沙起来在房内来回走了一趟，又上床伏在孩子身上。孩子打了七个喷嚏，便睁开了眼睛。
